rationale: Educ. Code §12.104 governs which Education Code provisions apply to open-enrollment charter schools. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, Tax Code §11.13, property tax appraisal, or school district revenue/recapture formulas affected by exemption amounts.
quote: An open-enrollment charter school has the powers granted to schools under this title.
_note: No intersection between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute's subject matter. The rule addresses charter school applicability to Education Code provisions, not property tax or homestead exemption policy.
